samples.xml_description:
<module id="traffic_light">
    <description>Implement a traffic light with red, yellow, green indicators and a pedestrian button. In normal traffic light operation, the east-west (EW) cycle is 60 clock cycles of green, 5 clock cycles of yellow, 10 clock cycles of red, and the north-south (NS) cycle is 10 clock cycles of green, 5 clock cycles of yellow, 60 clock cycles of red. When the pedestrian button is pressed, if the remaining EW green time is greater than 10 clocks, it is shortened to 10 clocks. If the remaining green time is less than 10 clocks, it remains unchanged. The lane light and the sidewalk light are paired. When the lane light is green or yellow, the sidewalk light is red. When the lane light is red, the sidewalk light is green.</description>
    <ports>
        <input id="rst_n">Reset signal (active low).</input>
        <input id="clk">Clock signal.</input>
        <input id="pass_request">Pedestrian button input.</input>
        <output id="red">Red output signal.</output>
        <output id="yellow">Yellow output signal.</output>
        <output id="green">Green output signal.</output>
    </ports>
    <parameter_description>
        <enum name="idle">Idle state.</enum>
        <enum name="s1_red">State 1 red.</enum>
        <enum name="s2_yellow">State 2 yellow.</enum>
        <enum name="s3_green">State 3 green.</enum>
    </parameter_description>
    <logic_description>
        <sequential_logic>
            <reg id="cnt" width_description="[7:0]">8-bit counter.</reg>
            <reg id="state" width_description="[1:0]">2-bit state.</reg>
            <reg id="p_red">1-bit previous red.</reg>
            <reg id="p_yellow">1-bit previous yellow.</reg>
            <reg id="p_green">1-bit previous green.</reg>
        </sequential_logic>
    </logic_description>
    <implementation>
        <always_comb>
            <case expression="state">
                <item value="idle">
                    <assign id="state" value="s1_red"/>
                    <assign id="p_red" value="0"/>
                    <assign id="p_yellow" value="0"/>
                    <assign id="p_green" value="0"/>
                </item>
                <item value="s1_red">
                    <assign id="p_red" value="1"/>
                    <assign id="p_yellow" value="0"/>
                    <assign id="p_green" value="0"/>
                    <if expression="cnt == 3">
                        <assign id="state" value="s3_green"/>
                    </if>
                    <else>
                        <assign id="state" value="s1_red"/>
                    </else>
                </item>
                <item value="s2_yellow">
                    <assign id="p_red" value="0"/>
                    <assign id="p_yellow" value="1"/>
                    <assign id="p_green" value="0"/>
                    <if expression="cnt == 3">
                        <assign id="state" value="s1_red"/>
                    </if>
                    <else>
                        <assign id="state" value="s2_yellow"/>
                    </else>
                </item>
                <item value="s3_green">
                    <assign id="p_red" value="0"/>
                    <assign id="p_yellow" value="0"/>
                    <assign id="p_green" value="1"/>
                    <if expression="cnt == 3">
                        <assign id="state" value="s2_yellow"/>
                    </if>
                    <else>
                        <assign id="state" value="s3_green"/>
                    </else>
                </item>
            </case>
        </always_comb>
        <always_ff>
            <for expression="cnt">
                <if expression="!rst_n">
                    <assign id="cnt" value="10"/>
                </if>
                <else>
                    <if expression="pass_request && green">
                        <assign id="cnt" value="10"/>
                    </if>
                    <else>
                        <if expression="!green && p_green">
                            <assign id="cnt" value="60"/>
                        </if>
                        <else>
                            <if expression="!yellow && p_yellow">
                                <assign id="cnt" value="5"/>
                            </if>
                            <else>
                                <if expression="!red && p_red">
                                    <assign id="cnt" value="10"/>
                                </if>
                                <else>
                                    <assign id="cnt" value="cnt - 1"/>
                                </else>
                            </end>
                        </end>
                    </else>
                </end>
            </for>
        </always_ff>
        <always_ff>
            <for expression="red, yellow, green">
                <assign id="red" value="p_red"/>
                <assign id="yellow" value="p_yellow"/>
                <assign id="green" value="p_green"/>
            </for>
        </always_ff>
    </implementation>
</module>
